Portfolio

Selected projects — from AI platforms to education systems and enterprise web applications. Let's build something together →

Featured Projects

Own Product
AI Laravel WordPress SaaS PHP

Craftly — AI Agent Platform for Laravel & WordPress

The world's first AI agent platform that generates production-ready Laravel and WordPress web applications from a short description in under 5 minutes. Built from the ground up at ShvedkoDev in Göttingen for the DACH SMB market.

  • Agentic AI pipeline generating full application structure, routes, models, and views
  • Live preview rendered during generation — customers see the app being built in real time
  • Targets the 77% of the web running PHP where mainstream AI tools underinvest
View Landing Page →
Client Project
Laravel 12 Livewire 3 FilamentPHP Alpine.js Tailwind Docker

FSM VLA Curriculum — Digital Library for Micronesian Schools

Designed and built a full-stack digital library platform delivering 2,000+ educational books in native Micronesian languages to teachers across the Federated States of Micronesia. Enabled cultural preservation through accessible, searchable digital resources for remote Pacific island communities.

  • Advanced search & filtering across 2,000+ books (Subject, Grade, Language, Type, Year)
  • Admin dashboard via FilamentPHP managing all content, metadata, PDFs, and user-generated content
  • Analytics system tracking book views, downloads, search queries, and filter usage
  • Multiple responsive UI templates (Academic, Material, Modern) with mobile-first approach
  • Role-based access control, ratings, reviews, and favourites
Visit micronesian.school →
Client Project
Laravel React Tailwind CSS MSSQL REST API

Enterprise Insurance Platform — Frontend & Laravel Backend

Ongoing frontend and backend development for a German insurance-sector enterprise. Built a React frontend with Laravel REST API backend, integrating with enterprise MSSQL databases and existing business logic.

  • React component library with Tailwind CSS for consistent design language
  • Laravel REST API layer bridging frontend with legacy MSSQL data systems
  • Git-based CI workflow with GitHub integration

NDA — client details confidential

Education
Laravel PHP Curriculum Dev

Laravel Course — Webmaster Akademie Nürnberg

Developed and continuously updated a comprehensive Laravel course for remote students at Webmaster Akademie Nürnberg GmbH. Provided hands-on support, guided students through complex topics, and collaborated with fellow course developers to improve learning outcomes.

  • Full-curriculum Laravel course covering fundamentals through advanced topics
  • Student support and code reviews for remote learners
  • Collaborative curriculum improvement with the course development team
Webmaster Akademie →
Long-term
PHP Angular jQuery MySQL REST API

Copernicus GmbH — 9-Year Full-Stack Engagement

Long-running full-stack developer role at Copernicus GmbH in Göttingen, delivering backend PHP development, Angular and jQuery frontends, REST API design, and SQL optimisation across internal enterprise systems.

  • PHP backend development as primary responsibility
  • Angular 9 and jQuery frontend development
  • RESTful API design and integration
  • MySQL performance tuning and complex query optimisation

Internal systems — no public URL

Freelance
PHP Laravel Symfony React Vue.js TypeScript REST API MySQL

Upwork Freelance — International PHP & Full-Stack Projects

Since 2022 we've delivered freelance projects for international clients via Upwork, covering the full PHP stack: Laravel and Symfony backends, React and Vue.js frontends, RESTful API design, MySQL optimisation, and TypeScript. Projects span custom web applications, SaaS features, API integrations, and legacy PHP modernisation.

  • PHP backend development with Laravel and Symfony
  • React, Vue.js, Angular, and jQuery frontends
  • RESTful API design and third-party integrations
  • MySQL query optimisation and schema design
  • TypeScript, EcmaScript, AJAX, XML/JSON data handling
View Upwork Profile →
